scripts.db:migrate: bash ./scripts/python-project.sh services/api alembic -c alembic.ini upgrade head
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -k -n web,api,worker -c cyan,green,yellow "pnpm dev:web" "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:worker"
scripts.lint:py: bash ./scripts/python-project.sh services/api ruff check . && bash ./scripts/python-project.sh services/worker ruff check . && bash ./scripts/python-project.sh services/simulation-engine ruff check .
scripts.test:js: pnpm --filter @bio/web --if-present test && pnpm --filter @bio/api-client --if-present test && pnpm --filter @bio/ui --if-present test && pnpm --filter @bio/design-tokens --if-present test
scripts.test:py: bash ./scripts/python-project.sh services/api pytest && bash ./scripts/python-project.sh services/worker pytest && bash ./scripts/python-project.sh services/simulation-engine pytest
